meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe offer a man and van service in Leatherhead and the surrounding areas. This is perfect for smaller domestic or commercial moves like office and flat moves or single item deliveries. Get your free quote today!
intro_paragraph: Working in the Guildford, Surrey and Leatherhead area, we are an independent, local moving company who offer moving services to both domestic customers and commercial businesses. Not only do we offer a fully comprehensive moving service, we also offer a lower cost man and van hire in Leatherhead which is perfect for smaller moves such as single item deliveries, student removals or smaller house removals/office removals.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Man and Van in Leatherhead

Our Man with a Van hire is perfect for smaller moves, providing you first class service at a lower price.

How can we help you today?

Mark Ratcliffe's Affordable Man in Van in Leatherhead

Working in the Guildford, Surrey and Leatherhead area, we are an independent, local moving company who offer moving services to both domestic customers and commercial businesses. Not only do we offer a fully comprehensive moving service, we also offer a lower cost man and van hire in Leatherhead which is perfect for smaller moves such as single item deliveries, student removals or smaller house removals/office removals.

We understand that it takes a great deal of trust to leave your belongings in the hands of someone else. At Mark Ratcliffe, we will treat your belongings as our own. We are committed to providing first class, professional and reliable service. This is demonstrated by our customer reviews - have a read of our testimonials to discover what keeps our customers returning to our service. Not only does our service come with a working man, your van is equipped with GPS, loading ramps, furniture covers, and ties to ensure your belongings are kept safe and secure. Our drivers are all respectable, polite and uniformed who are more than happy to go the extra mile to get the job done to the highest standard possible. They are familiar with the local area, meaning your move goes ahead quickly and without interruptions.

Man and Van Hire Leatherhead Rate:

We understand that sometimes an entire removals team and multiple vans may not be necessary. We provide an affordable alternative to smaller moves:

  • ‍Man with Van and working driver - £70 per hour
  • ‍Man and Van with driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

Man van prices are inclusive of vat and fuel (within the local area). We work flexibly, meaning we even supply our services on weekends.

First Class Removals Leatherhead

We are a friendly, polite and helpful 'man with van' team who are available for any type of move. Not only do we assist with the moving, we also offer packing services and self storage options. Our man and van in Leatherhead is available if you are moving flat, require an office removals service, require a one off delivery, or simply need advice about your move - don't hesitate to give us contact us here about man and van removals, call us on 01323 848 008 or for your free quote, just click the "Request a Quote" button at the top of the page.

‍
